name: Cafe Kati's Mango Spring Rolls
recipeIngredient: Lettuce leaves (4, ribs removed, leaves halved lengthwise)
Fresh bean sprouts (4 oz or 1 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the rice vermicelli in warm water for about 15 minutes, then drain and set aside.
2. Dip each sheet of rice paper in warm water (approximately 110 degrees) until pliable. Place a lettuce leaf on the bottom two-thirds of the rice paper, leaving a 2-inch border at the bottom.
3. Arrange the filling ingredients: vermicelli (2 tbsp), shredded carrot (1 tbsp), mango slices (2 tbsp), basil leaves (1 tbsp), mint leaves (1 tbsp), and bean sprouts (2 tbsp) on top of the lettuce.
4. Fold up the 2-inch border of rice paper over the filling, then fold upward to enclose it. Fold in the right edge, then the left edge. Continue folding until a tight cylinder is formed.
5. Place the spring roll on a serving tray and cover with a damp paper towel. Repeat steps 2-4 for all ingredients used.
6. Serve with Spicy Thai Vinaigrette as a dipping sauce.
